creator: dalibor.gudzic@gmail.com
text:
A small followup, I tried the new FreeBSD 8-RELEASE and now I am able
to pass the boot. But the atheros is still not functioning. Here is
the full dmesg:

FreeBSD is a registered trademark of The FreeBSD Foundation.
